message:
refactor: replace fmt.Printf with log.Printf in library code

Per AGENTS.md guidelines: "No random fmt.Println in library code;
use standard log package."

Changes:
- internal/checkpoint/capture.go: warnings for scrollback, layout, untracked
- internal/gemini/setup.go: model selection verbose output
- internal/plugins/agent.go: plugin parsing warnings
- internal/session/restore.go: git branch mismatch warning
